description: Set up a Jenkins CI environment for 'Project Alpha' (http://localhost:8080, Login: admin / Admin123!). Create a Pipeline job named 'alpha-backend-build' that clones from https://github.com/jenkinsci/pipeline-examples (master branch) and automatically polls SCM every 15 minutes using hash-based scheduling. Create a job named 'alpha-frontend-build' with a NODE_VERSION choice parameter (options: 16, 18, 20 in that order) and a build discarder keeping the last 7 builds. Provision a secret-text credential named 'npm-registry-token' to store the NPM authentication token and create a list view named 'Project-Alpha CI' containing both jobs so the team
